svg.text: Allied KCC — System Architecture (v0.6, member-first pilot)

v1 = UCDF member-first (Uttarakhand): COOP passbook wedge → KCC → Pashu Suraksha · all-allied credit catalog · offline-first · Intelligence Layer: CV muzzle-ID · Indic voice · predictive ML · deferred items tagged (P4)
Farmer App — Expo RN 0.81 · one app (~50 screens) · OFFLINE-FIRST · on-device QC
auth · onboarding (multi-activity + society link) · registers · logbook (voice-first)
kcc-*: calculator → apply → limit dashboard → LT drawdown (¶19(2)) → renewal pack
pashu-*: tagging + muzzle burst · enrol · vault · renew ★ · report-death · claim
society-*: order (70% meter, voice) · status timeline · receipt · milk passbook
Role Surfaces — ONE offline field PWA + insurer-ops (role-gated, never shared screens)
Field PWA: VO exams/valuations/e-PM + honorarium · Surveyor SLA queue + field filing ·
POSP tasks + escrow card — three role views, one offline-capable shell (v1)
Insurer-ops (Next.js): exceptions · allocation · settle (human-only) · fraud queue
Banker: renewal-pack PDF handoff (v1) → dashboard (P4) | Gov: Annexure XX report (P4 white-label)
Express API — /api/v1 · JWT + 4-digit MPIN + OTP (no passwords) · Aadhaar step-up

middleware: roleCheck [ FARMER · VET · SURVEYOR · POSP · INSURER_OPS · GOV_VIEWER · GP_BDO · BANKER ] · Joi validate · rate-limit · X-Language · requestId — co-op approvers are NOT app roles (ERP-side)
BACKEND MODULES — Node 20 + Express 4 · PostgreSQL 16 (pgvector · PostGIS) · MVC + service layer · getDb() lazy-load · snake_case DB / camelCase DTO
v1: milk fat/SNF + feed (free from ERP/
auth (MPIN+OTP · JWT · Aadhaar) · farmer (multi-activity · KYC) · location (LGD)
compliance (DPDP consents incl. model_improvement purpose) · notifications (SMS/WA/push/IVR)
domain_events outbox (append-only — audit + ML training spine)
coop/ — society farmers (source of truth: Input Service App.pdf · UCDF/Aanchal)
order ≤ 70% × outstanding milk payables · windows: 1st & 3rd week · voice ordering
app authors only SUBMIT + RECEIPT_CONFIRM — approvals mirrored from Aanchal ERP
milk passbook → TRUST + drawing power · delivered orders auto-log as feed costs
AI SERVICES — Python 3.12 + FastAPI · ONNX Runtime (CPU-first) · statutory math is never a model · AI proposes, humans dispose
doc-AI (vet certs · PM reports) · image forensics
Pashu Mitra RAG · grievance triage · IVR twin
fraud score (decision support) · price/THI heat stress
shadow → assist → override · kill-switch per model
Label Studio · data cards · bias review · drift watch
Registers feed the Limit Engine — live units drive drawing limits
Logbook P&L → TRUST → drawing power + one-tap renewal pack
Voice: speech → ASR draft → farmer confirms → logbook (never auto-commit)
Enrolment → VO exam → policy → 15% premium via KCC (¶32–33) + muzzle dedupe (shadow)
Death → surveyor + VO e-PM + muzzle match → 4 docs → 15-day SLA (12% penalty)
Renewal sweep → propensity-targeted reminders → one-tap renew ★
Society order (≤70% payables) → ERP chain → dispatch alert → receipt
